name: test_verify_invalid_username_password_validation
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible
Actual value: None
Error: element(s) not found

  - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 5000ms

statusTrace:
page = <Page url='https://d1lifbniuc73oj.cloudfront.net/auth/login'>

    def test_verify_invalid_username_password_validation(page: Page):
    
        # ==========================================================
        # Test Data
        # ==========================================================
    
        base_url = "https://d1lifbniuc73oj.cloudfront.net/auth/login"
    
        invalid_username = "CSASINHN123"
        invalid_password = "GOLD950123"
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 1 : Launch Application
        # ==========================================================
    
        page.goto(base_url)
    
        expect(page).to_have_url(
            re.compile(r".*/auth/login")
        )
    
        print("✓ Login page loaded successfully.")
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 2 : Verify Login Page
        # ==========================================================
    
        expect(
            page.get_by_role(
                "heading",
                name="Welcome Back!"
            )
        ).to_be_visible()
    
        expect(
            page.get_by_role(
                "textbox",
                name="User ID"
            )
        ).to_be_visible()
    
        expect(
            page.get_by_role(
                "textbox",
                name="Password"
            )
        ).to_be_visible()
    
        print("✓ Login page verified.")
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 3 : Enter Invalid Credentials
        # ==========================================================
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="User ID"
        ).fill(invalid_username)
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="Password"
        ).fill(invalid_password)
    
        print("✓ Invalid credentials entered.")
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 4 : Click Login
        # ==========================================================
    
        login_button = page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Login"
        )
    
        expect(login_button).to_be_enabled()
    
        login_button.click()
    
        print("✓ Login button clicked.")
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 5 : Verify Validation Message
        # ==========================================================
    
        validation_message = page.get_by_text(
            re.compile(
                r"Invalid Username or Password",
                re.IGNORECASE
            )
        )
